entities.name: JATROPHA CURCAS
entities.description: A plant species used for bio-diesel production to address land, energy, and food challenges in dryland areas

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region facing urgent food and energy security challenges, particularly in rural dryland farming areas

entities.name: DRYLAND
entities.description: Arid or semi-arid farming environments within Sub-Saharan Africa characterized by food and energy scarcity

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, and nutritious food

entities.name: ENERGY SECURITY
entities.description: The uninterrupted availability of energy sources at an affordable price

entities.name: BIO-DIESEL
entities.description: A fuel derived from methyl esters, specifically from Jatropha curcas, serving as an alternative to fossil diesel

entities.name: EMISSION REDUCTION
entities.description: The potential of bio-diesel to lower harmful emissions compared to traditional fuels

entities.name: SOIL RESOURCE RECAPITALIZATION
entities.description: An innovative and environmentally friendly approach to restoring soil resources using Jatropha technology

entities.name: LAND USE CONFLICT
entities.description: The competition and tension between land used for food production and land used for energy production

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: Global increase in population that places pressure on land for food and energy production

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The framework emphasizing the sustainable use of land resources to increase food productivity and energy requirements
